---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability for gemini-plugin
title: '[feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## The problem

What user problem are you trying to solve?

## Why current functionality does not cover this

The plugin already ships 4 subagents (validator, challenger, researcher, summarizer), 6 auto-trigger hooks, 5 slash commands, and 8 capability skills. Briefly explain why these do not address your use case.

## Proposed solution

What user-visible behavior would solve this? Be concrete.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you ruled them out.

## Additional context

Mockups, related issues, or links to similar features in other plugins.
